purpose: Authorize governed provider fallback for cognitive Story-to-TDD lanes when the declared primary provider is unavailable, while preserving provider identity, receipts, and candidate-only authority posture.
law: Gemini failure does not stop the compiler; it triggers governed provider fallback. OpenAI fallback supplies a receipted candidate only. Gates still decide, receipts still prove, and SOG still promotes.
requires: primary provider invocation receipt exists before fallback
primary failure code is mapped to an allowed fallback reason
fallback provider is declared in policy before use
fallback dispatch packet is written before invocation
fallback response packet is written after invocation
fallback invocation receipt records provider identity
fallback candidate remains candidate-only until governed hardening
generated implementation cannot materialize before red receipt and accepted provider candidate
green cannot exist without prior red
durable product truth remains blocked until SOG capability coverage, execution, and parity evidence exist
forbids: claiming Gemini output when OpenAI produced the candidate
provider candidate becoming authority without gates
mock AI response in cognitive compile
completionPosture: Provider fallback is resilience, not authority. It may continue the cognitive lane only through declared provider selection, provider-attributed receipts, and the same acceptance gates.
